GGNF.Title: GG Nameforge
GGNF.Errors.NoActorPerm: You don't have permission to create actors.
GGNF.Errors.NoItemPerm: You don't have permission to create items.
GGNF.Errors.ActorFailed: Could not create the NPC actor.
GGNF.NoFavorites: No favorites yet. Tap the star on any result to save it.
GGNF.Settings.Language.Name: Language
GGNF.Settings.Language.Hint: Force a language, or follow Foundry's interface language.
GGNF.Fallback.Name: Unnamed
GGNF.Actor.KitPartial: {name}: couldn't find in your compendiums: {missing}. NPC created without those pieces.
GGNF.Settings.PrototypeSource.Name: Stat block source
GGNF.Settings.PrototypeSource.Hint: When an official NPC exists near the requested CR, its full stat block is used (saves, skills, actions and reactions) with the generated name and flavor. If nothing is close, the NPC is generated from scratch.
GGNF.Kind.label: Kind
GGNF.Card.Generated: generated — no official stat block for this CR
GGNF.Actor.CRAdjusted: {name}: requested CR {requested}; the closest official stat block is CR {actual}.
GGNF.Actor.SpellbookBoosted: {name}: spellbook reinforced — effective CR raised to {cr} (base stat block CR {base}).
GGNF.Settings.QuickCR.Name: Quick NPC challenge rating
GGNF.Settings.QuickCR.Hint: CR used by the one-click NPC. Auto scales with the party's average level.
GGNF.Keybind.QuickNPC.Name: Quick NPC
GGNF.Keybind.QuickNPC.Hint: Generates a complete NPC instantly: random race and role, CR to match the party, sheet opened.
GGNF.Quick.Failed: Quick generation failed — see the console.
GGNF.Promote.Title: Promote NPC
GGNF.Promote.Intro: {name} is currently CR {cr}. Pick the new stat block tier — name, portrait, token and biography are preserved.
GGNF.Promote.InventoryNote: Combat gear, features and spells are replaced by the new stat block. Loot, consumables and quest items are kept.
GGNF.Promote.NoPrototype: No official stat block found for that tier — check the compendium source setting.
GGNF.Promote.MaxCR: This NPC is already at the highest tier Nameforge handles.
GGNF.Promote.NoBetter: {name}: no official stat block above CR {cr} was found in your compendiums — nothing was changed.
